name: OneIM Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I Introduction We are a blank check exempted company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on September 5, 2025, and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (a Business Combination). We intend to utilize cash derived from the proceeds of our IPO (the IPO), our securities, debt or a combination of cash, securities and debt, in effecting a business combinati...
